name: cc-garden
description: Personal collection of Claude Code plugins — utilities for Python project bootstrap, classified-ad posting, and project retrospective analysis.

plugins.name: retro
plugins.description: Reconstruct decision history for the current project from local Claude Code session JSONLs. Produces a Markdown retrospective with timeline, abandoned approaches, topic map, intent vs state, and recommended CLAUDE.md rules.

plugins.name: bazaraki-post-ad
plugins.description: Automate posting classified ads on Bazaraki.com (Cyprus). Fills all form fields — category, title, price, description, dropdowns, WhatsApp — then pauses for manual photo upload.

plugins.name: new-python-project
plugins.description: Initialize a new Python project with copier-astral template, uv, ruff, pytest, gtm time tracking, GitHub private repo, and feature-branch workflow.
